case_title: DAVID CARSWELL VS. THOMAS-JAMES ARCENEAUX et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-15-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-22-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF CARSWELL RE: NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARSWELL, DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CARSWELL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ARCENEAUX, THOMAS-JAMES CROWDER, SHAUN MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 5/16/12 TO PLAINTIFF DAVID CARSWELL, "NO SUCH ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARSWELL, DAVID ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
